title: mespilus glandulosa
intro: Mespilus glandulosa, also known as Chinese haw or Chinese rowan, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Mespilus glandulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional Asian herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
